'''Wakiza''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Wakiza system/Legends|Wakiza system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. One of the original thirteen planets of the [[Duskhan League]], it was located within the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. Wakiza was orbited by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] shipyard [[Black Eight]]. [[Nagelson|"Sleepy" Nagelson]] was shot down while flying a reconnaissance mission over Wakiza for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
